AFTER CONSIDERATION OF THE MERITS OF THE ACTION, COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN RULED AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, SKETCHERS, U.S.A. INC. AND AGAINST DEFENDANT DAVID ENGEL IND. AND DBA. VILLAINS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,42049 PRINCIPAL, $847.14 INTEREST, AND ATTORNEY FEES IN THE SUM OF $612.62. COST ARE IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF PER COST BILL.
